docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROUT, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARS DAWYDIAK $4,127.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,177.00, THE CONTRACT IS RESCINDED. WITHIN TEN DAYS OF THE DATE JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL, PLAINTIFF SHALL TRANSFER TITLE AND RELEASE ANY INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-03-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 414

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT PROUT, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CARS DAWYDIAK $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,050.00, PLAINTIFF TO DELIVER ORIGINAL TITLE TO DEFENDANT PROMPTLY AFTER HIS RECEIPT OF PAYMENT. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:43 am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Cars Dawydiak appears through Mark Thomas and Walter Dawydiak. Respondent, Michael Prout appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR (A) packet of documents, starting with contract
EXHR (B) copies of phone bill

11:21am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-28-2010 Judgment Entered
